33 _18 PRE_HOSP_VCTNL_CTGRY_CD (18) Pre-Hospital Vocational Category CHAR 2 Indicates the vocational status of the patient prior to hospitalization. 01 = Employed, 02 = Sheltered, 03 = Student, 04 = Homemaker, 05 = Not Working, 06 = Retired for Age, 07 = Retired for Disability
34 _19 PRE_HOSP_VCTNL_EFRT_CD (19) Pre-Hospital Vocational Effort CHAR
